metadata.title: Math Curve Loaders
metadata.description: High-fidelity mathematical curve loading animation gallery

gallery.title: A Gallery of Mathematical Loading Animations

detail.reactHint: Single file, {react} only — save as {tsx}, import the named export.
detail.reactHintTail: Embedded numbers update when you adjust controls (same as preview).

original-thinking.name: Original Thinking
original-thinking.description: Two lines: x = 7cos(t) − d·cos(7t), y = 7sin(t) − d·sin(7t) with d on the pulse. Same family as the sliders — tune Petals / Detail instead of duplicating cards.

thinking-five.name: Thinking Five
thinking-five.description: Five lobes: smaller k than the default seven, so the inner pattern stays open and rhythmic.

thinking-nine.name: Thinking Nine
thinking-nine.description: Nine lobes: higher k packs more turns in the ring for a denser, more braided look.

rose-orbit.name: Rose Orbit
rose-orbit.description: Orbit radius is modulated by cos(k·t).

rose-curve.name: Rose Curve
rose-curve.description: Using r = a cos(5t) creates five evenly spaced lobes, and the breathing multiplier gently swells each petal in and out.

rose-two.name: Rose Two
rose-two.description: With k = 2, the cosine radius forms broad opposing petals, and the breathing factor makes the center pulse like the original.

rose-three.name: Rose Three
rose-three.description: With k = 3, the curve resolves into three rotating petals, and the inner breathing keeps the motion from feeling mathematically rigid.

rose-four.name: Rose Four
rose-four.description: With k = 4, the petals settle into a balanced cross-like rose, and the breathing core adds the same soft pulse as the original loader.

three-petal-spiral.name: Three-Petal Spiral
three-petal-spiral.description: This rolling-circle setup resolves into three large looping petals, all breathing together like a compact spiral flower.

four-petal-spiral.name: Four-Petal Spiral
four-petal-spiral.description: With R = 4, the rolling-circle path settles into four looping petals, rotating and breathing as one ring.

five-petal-spiral.name: Five-Petal Spiral
five-petal-spiral.description: With R = 5, the loop count increases to five petals, giving the spiral flower a denser and more ornate rhythm.

six-petal-spiral.name: Six-Petal Spiral
six-petal-spiral.description: The rolling-circle path splits into six petals, and the whole ring breathes in one unified pulse like the original loader.

butterfly-phase.name: Butterfly Phase
butterfly-phase.description: Exponential and high-frequency cosine terms stretch the wings unevenly.

heart-wave.name: Heart Wave
heart-wave.description: x^(2/3) envelope with sin(bπx) interior ripples.

spiral-search.name: Spiral Search
spiral-search.description: Fast-growing angle combined with a cosine-modulated radius.

fourier-flow.name: Fourier Flow
fourier-flow.description: Sine and cosine components interfere with one another.
